q_quant_rationale: The analysis explicitly compares December revenue to October (the baseline given in the hypothesis), quantifies it as '~15.5% below October', and correctly identifies the direction (below, opposite of the hypothesized 10-20% lift).
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports the monthly values (Oct 4,090,610; Nov 3,467,256; Dec 3,456,443) and delivers a clear verdict that the hypothesis is contradicted.
